tagline: Midwest Values in a Southwest Paradise

hero.headline:
Midwest Work Ethic, Arizona
Pool Perfection
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves someone who treats it like their own. Good Life Pool & Spa Care delivers thorough, honest service backed by 20+ years of combined experience — so you can stop worrying and start swimming.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pool Care Done Right,<br class="hidden md:block"> Every Single Week
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency green-pool rescues, our CPO-certified team handles it all — so your only job is enjoying the water.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Skimming, brushing, vacuuming, chemical testing, and equipment checks — for chlorine pools, salt pools, and spas of every size. Crystal clear, every week.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrades
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, plumbing — we diagnose fast and quote upfront. No surprise charges, no runaround. Most repairs done same-visit.

cards.title: Green-to-Clean Recovery
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swamp-green? We bring it back to pristine in days, not weeks. Emergency same-day response available across the East Valley.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Balancing
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing that keeps water safe, clear, and gentle on skin. No red eyes, no irritation — just water you actually want to swim in.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Licensed ROC #334813 contractor serving apartment complexes, resorts, country clubs, and community pools. Consistent, code-compliant, fully insured.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Care
cards.description: Specialized spa maintenance including water balancing, jet cleaning, filter care, and seasonal prep. Keep your spa relaxation-ready year-round in Arizona's climate.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool. Shaun personally reviews every inquiry and responds same-day or next-day with an honest, no-pressure quote. No contracts required.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Our CPO-certified technicians arrive on schedule and treat your pool like it's their own. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment — every detail handled with Midwest thoroughness.

steps.title: Dive In and Relax
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, swim-ready, and worry-free all year. If anything isn't perfect, we come back and make it right — that's the Good Life promise.

about.label: Why Mesa Trusts Good Life
about.headline: Built on Hard Work, Not Empty Promises
about.description: Shaun Erwin left the Midwest for Arizona's sunshine — but brought along the work ethic that comes from growing up in agriculture. Every pool gets the same careful attention, every customer gets straight talk and fair pricing. With CPO-certified professionals and 20+ years of combined experience, Good Life Pool & Spa Care has earned its perfect 5-star reputation one pool at a time.

features.title: Owner-Operated, Every Visit
features.description: Shaun and his trained team personally handle every service call. No subcontractors, no revolving door of strangers in your backyard.

features.title: Upfront Quotes, No Surprises
features.description: You get a detailed written quote before any work begins. The price we quote is the price you pay — no hidden fees, no bait-and-switch.

features.title: Your Satisfaction, Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. We earn your trust every single week, not with contracts — with results.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no cancellation penalties.

guarantee.headline: Our "Good Life" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — completely free. No fine print, no runaround. We built this business on doing the job right, and we stand behind every single visit.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 days. For green pool emergencies, Shaun typically responds same-day or next-day. Just call (480) 269-5620 and we'll get you taken care of fast.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when you come?
faqs.answer: Not at all! Most of our clients give us gate access and we handle everything while you're at work or out. You'll know exactly what was done after each visit.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team holds CPO (Certified Pool Operator) certifications and we're a licensed Arizona ROC contractor (#334813). We carry full liability insurance for your peace of mind.

faqs.question: Do you require long-term contracts?
faqs.answer: Never. We believe in earning your business every visit. No contracts, no cancellation fees, no commitments. If we're not the right fit, you can cancel anytime — no hard feelings.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools and spas?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We're licensed (ROC #334813) for commercial pool maintenance and repair, serving apartment complexes, country clubs, resorts, and community pools across the East Valley.

testimonials.name: Hatem H.
testimonials.text: Shaun is awesome! He's a very hardworking fella and always takes care of my pool like it's his. Have been using him for 2 years and will continue to do so!

testimonials.name: Katie G.
testimonials.text: We recently had Shaun replace our pool filter and repair some above ground plumbing issues. He provided us with a detailed quote up front and was able to return two days later to start the job. Professional and tidy.

testimonials.name: RJ H.
testimonials.text: Very professional and great to work with! Response time is immediate and Shaun was able to provide great advice on how to keep up with our pool in between servicing, which was greatly appreciated!

benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
